name: pkc
description: PKC — Portable Knowledge Cartridge. Desktop tool for Mac, Linux, and Windows.

scripts.build: npm run build:llama && npm run build:packit && npm run build:web && npx cap sync @capacitor-community/electron
scripts.electron:start: npm run build && npm --prefix electron run electron:start
scripts.electron:start-live: npm run build && npm --prefix electron run electron:start-live
scripts.electron:pack: npm run build && npm --prefix electron run electron:pack
scripts.electron:make: npm run build && npm --prefix electron run electron:make
scripts.postinstall: npm run build:js --prefix ./node_modules/llama-cpp-pro || true; npm run build --prefix ref-code/pack-it-pkc || true
